$comment: Surface manifest. 'default' = npm-package stdio (unfiltered). 'hosted-15' = the ORIGINAL, historical hosted default (pre-2026-07-20) — kept PINNED (do not resize) as a regression fixture for the eval harness (npm-package/eval/model-eval-runner.mjs --surface=hosted-15, npm-package/tests/eval/model-eval-runner.test.ts, .github/workflows/eval-harness.yml): it proves these 15 tools stay reachable on hosted regardless of how the live surface grows. 'hosted' = the REAL, LIVE mcp.novada.com default surface as of 2026-07-20, once hosted-server/vercel/api/mcp.ts's TOOLS array was changed from a hand-curated 15-tool literal to `CORE_TOOLS.map(...)` (derived from npm-package/src/core.ts's `TOOLS`, the single source of truth) filtered by mcp.ts's `HOSTED_HIDDEN` set. This 'hosted' list is a superset of 'hosted-15' (all 15 legacy tools plus the 15 platform-scraper tools, novada_scrape_amazon..novada_scrape_perplexity) minus HOSTED_HIDDEN's 8 exclusions (novada_browser_flow, novada_site_copy, novada_ip_whitelist, novada_static_ip_mgmt, novada_capture_apikey, novada_session_stats, novada_search_feedback, novada_verify — see mcp.ts's HOSTED_HIDDEN docstring for the rationale on each). scripts/check-hosted-drift.mjs verifies this list is (a) a subset of npm-package's REGISTERED_TOOL_NAMES, (b) an exact SET match against mcp.ts's live derived TOOLS output, (c) a superset of 'hosted-15', and (d) that mcp.ts's TOOLS is actually built via `CORE_TOOLS.map(...)` rather than a hand-curated literal (drift would otherwise be structurally impossible to reintroduce silently, per that script's docstring).

hosted-15.description: PINNED historical hosted default (do not resize — see $comment). Verbatim from mcp.novada.com's original hand-curated TOOLS array before the 2026-07-20 core-derivation refactor; still 100% valid today since every one of these 15 remains visible on the live 'hosted' surface below.

hosted.description: mcp.novada.com's REAL, LIVE default surface as of 2026-07-20 (2026-07-20 core-derivation refactor — see $comment). Core-derived: npm-package's core.ts TOOLS (38 registered tools) minus hosted-server/vercel/api/mcp.ts's HOSTED_HIDDEN set (8 tools: novada_browser_flow, novada_site_copy, novada_ip_whitelist, novada_static_ip_mgmt, novada_capture_apikey, novada_session_stats, novada_search_feedback, novada_verify).
